productDisplayName: Puma Men Flux-M Black Red Black Watches
description: This watch from puma comes in a clean sleek design. This active watch is perfect for urban wear and can serve you well on casual outings or a night of clubbing. Case diameter:  40 mmCase thickness:  10 mmDial shape: RectangularWarranty: 2 YearsPlastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and stylecat logo on the strapDigital dial showing chronograph, count-down timer, lap counter, alarm and  backlightQuartz movement of time display Acrylic dial window gives better durabilityButtons on the sides to reset time and featuresSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant upto 50 metres
